name: Samyang Lens AF 14mm f/2.8 For Nikon F
description: Xpand your imaging capabilities with the ultra-wide-angle view provided by Samyang AF 14mm f/2.8 FE Lens cameras. This optic is quite fast for its class with an f/2.8 maximum aperture which will help users work in low-light conditions.

features.Key Features :: Full-Frame Format | Aperture Range: f/2.8 to f/22 | Three Aspherical & Two ED Elements | Ultra Multi-Coating | Autofocus with Manual Focus Override | Rounded 7-Blade Diaphragm | Integrated Lens Hood
